meaning: adj.鐖卞皵鍏扮殑n.鐖卞皵鍏颁汉
examples: Together they formed what we call the Milesian School of Pre-Socratic philosophy.
Really try to put yourself in the shoes of our ancient Milesian who has just heard these words for the first time.
Let us assume that you, the Milesian standing in the square listening to Thales, know perfectly well what the word everything means.
